scripts.render: remotion render src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial out/orbit-commercial-raw.mp4 && node scripts/finalize-render.cjs
scripts.frames: remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene1.png --frame=45 && remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene2.png --frame=165 && remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene3.png --frame=365 && remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene4.png --frame=545 && remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene5.png --frame=630 && remotion still src/index.tsx OrbitCommercial frames/scene6.png --frame=745
